content.full_text:
May 27, 1976

Ms. Judy Clemmons  
5106 Federal Boulevard  
Suite 113B  
San Diego, California 92105

Dear Ms. Clemmons:

RE: Campaign Statement for Assemblyman Pete Chacon,  
79th Assembly District

This letter is to confirm our May 25, 1976 telephone conversation regarding the reporting of late contributions.

You stated that Assemblyman Chacon received a late contribution on May 25, 1976, one day after the closing date for the second pre-primary campaign statement. Since you had not completed and filed the pre-primary statement, covering the period from April 27, 1976 through May 24, 1976, you asked whether you could extend the period covered by the report one day so that you could include receipt of the late contribution. I indicated that your second pre-primary campaign statement could cover the period from April 27, 1976 through May 25, 1976 and that you would not have to file a separate report regarding the late contribution. The beginning date, therefore, for your post-primary election statement will be May 26, 1976.

If we can be of further assistance, please contact us again.

Sincerely,

NAN HAMBLETON  
Special Compliance Representative

NH:mak

cc: Political Reform Unit  
Secretary of State's Office

bcc: Jeanne

sections.question_synthetic: May the reporting period for a pre-primary campaign statement be extended by one day to include a late contribution received after the original closing date?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: Yes, the pre-primary campaign statement may be extended to cover the additional day (April 27 through May 25, 1976) to include the late contribution, and no separate report is required. The next post-primary statement period will begin on May 26, 1976.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is confirmation of prior telephone conversation rather than response to written request. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present. Advice is provided in letter body. Parsing confidence high due to clear subject matter and directive advice.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: May the reporting period for a pre-primary campaign statement be extended by one day to include a late contribution received after the original closing date?

CONCLUSION: Yes, the pre-primary campaign statement may be extended to cover the additional day (April 27 through May 25, 1976) to include the late contribution, and no separate report is required. The next post-primary statement period will begin on May 26, 1976.
